title: neottia flava
intro: Neottia flava, also known as the yellow tooth-orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and slender stem. Traditionally, Neottia flava has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Neottia flava can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
